mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (name, description, description_url, image, secondary_name, sku_id, category_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{descriptionUrl}, #{image}, #{secondaryName}, #{skuId}, #{categoryId})
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, description_url = #{descriptionUrl}, image = #{image}, secondary_name = #{secondaryName}, sku_id = #{skuId}, category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM items WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM items WHERE name = #{name} AND id != #{excludeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, COUNT(i.id) as itemCount FROM category c LEFT JOIN items i ON c.id = i.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.id ASC
